title: Kyiv: Attack attack
description: 'If Ukraine burns, so will Moscow' — Zelensky confirms 2nd strike on Moscow Oil Refinery in a week. At least 17 people, including two children, were injured in Moscow Oblast in the attack, Russian authorities claimed. Photo: AFP via Getty Images
description_en: 'If Ukraine burns, so will Moscow' — Zelensky confirms 2nd strike on Moscow Oil Refinery in a week. At least 17 people, including two children, were injured in Moscow Oblast in the attack, Russian authorities claimed. Photo: AFP via Getty Images
description_uk: 'If Ukraine burns, so will Moscow' — Zelensky confirms 2nd strike on Moscow Oil Refinery in a week. At least 17 people, including two children, were injured in Moscow Oblast in the attack, Russian authorities claimed. Photo: AFP via Getty Images

title: 992 drones
description: 992 drones, four long-range cruise missiles and 10 aerial bombs repulsed the Russian air defense forces in a day, — Ministry of Pizdezha of the Russian Federation Is that what it is called now? Reflected? 🤣
description_en: 992 drones, four long-range cruise missiles and 10 aerial bombs repulsed the Russian air defense forces in a day, — Ministry of Pizdezha of the Russian Federation Is that what it is called now? Reflected? 🤣
description_uk: 992 дрона, четыре крылатые ракеты большой дальности и 10 авиабомб отразили силы ПВО россии за сутки, — Минпиздежа рф Теперь это так называется? Отразили? 🤣

title: Missile launch detected
description: Here is another interesting shot of how the leaky Katsap air defense system works on our drone. Two anti-aircraft missiles, launched from different positions, failed to shoot down the UAV. And then they whine that something is flying over their houses. And where did their crooked rockets go?
description_en: Here is another interesting shot of how the leaky Katsap air defense system works on our drone. Two anti-aircraft missiles, launched from different positions, failed to shoot down the UAV. And then they whine that something is flying over their houses. And where did their crooked rockets go?
description_uk: Вот еще интересный кадр, как по нашему дрону работает дырявая кацапская ПВО. Две зенитные ракеты, выпущенные с разных позиций, так и не смогли сбить БпЛА А потом они хнычут, что что-то прилетает по их домам. А их ракеты кривые куда полетели?

title: Attack attack
description: It was hot in Crimea too. An important railway artery of the occupiers came under attack - a bridge in the Razdolny district. Train traffic is temporarily suspended. We like this kind of morning 🔥
description_en: It was hot in Crimea too. An important railway artery of the occupiers came under attack - a bridge in the Razdolny district. Train traffic is temporarily suspended. We like this kind of morning 🔥
description_uk: Было горячо и в Крыму. Под удар попала важная железнодорожная артерия оккупантов — мост в районе Раздольного Движение поездов временно приостановлено. Такое утро нам нравится 🔥

title: Donetsk: 239 drones launched
description: 216 TARGETS DESTROYED On the night of June 18 (from 18:00 on June 17), the enemy attacked with 7 Iskander-M/S-400 ballistic missiles from the Voronezh, Bryansk, and Kursk regions of the Russian Federation, 239 Shahed-type strike UAVs (including jet ones), Gerbera, Italmas, and Parody-type simulator drones from the directions: Kursk, Orel, Primorsko-Akhtarsk - Russian Federation, Gvardiyske - TOT AR Crimea, TOT Donetsk. Air strike...
description_en: 216 TARGETS DESTROYED On the night of June 18 (from 18:00 on June 17), the enemy attacked with 7 Iskander-M/S-400 ballistic missiles from the Voronezh, Bryansk, and Kursk regions of the Russian Federation, 239 Shahed-type strike UAVs (including jet ones), Gerbera, Italmas, and Parody-type simulator drones from the directions: Kursk, Orel, Primorsko-Akhtarsk - Russian Federation, Gvardiyske - TOT AR Crimea, TOT Donetsk. Air strike...
description_uk: ЗБИТО/ПОДАВЛЕНО 216 ЦІЛЕЙ У ніч на 18 червня (з 18:00 17 червня) противник атакував 7 балістичними ракетами Іскандер-М/С-400 із Воронезької, Брянської та Курської областей -рф, 239 ударними БпЛА типу Shahed (в т.ч. реактивними), Гербера, Італмас та дронами-імітаторами типу «Пародія» із напрямків: Курськ, Орел, Приморсько-Ахтарськ – рф., Гвардійське – ТОТ АР Крим, ТОТ Донецьк. Повітряний напад...

title: Kyiv: Drone strike
description: Update: Moscow Oil Refinery hit again in massive Ukrainian drone strike. Moscow Mayor Sergey Sobyanin reported that "multiple drones" hit the refinery, which was previously attacked on June 16.

title: Kyiv: Explosions reported
description: Moscow slammed by drones 2nd time in week as Ukraine hits back at Russia. Photos and videos posted by Moscow residents to social media depicted fires and explosions in multiple locations across the city. An oil depot in Russia's Rostov Oblast was also hit overnight, causing a massive fire. Photos: Exilenova-Plus / Telegram
description_en: Moscow slammed by drones 2nd time in week as Ukraine hits back at Russia. Photos and videos posted by Moscow residents to social media depicted fires and explosions in multiple locations across the city. An oil depot in Russia's Rostov Oblast was also hit overnight, causing a massive fire. Photos: Exilenova-Plus / Telegram

Photos and videos posted by Moscow residents to social media depicted fires and explosions in multiple locations across the city. An oil depot in Russia's Rostov Oblast was also hit overnight, causing a massive fire. Photos: Exilenova-Plus / Telegram

title: Kyiv: Ballistic missile launch detected
description: Explosions reported in Kyiv amid ballistic missile threat. Explosions were heard in Kyiv around 1:30 a.m. local time, according to a Kyiv Independent journalist on the ground. Earlier, Ukraine's Air Force had issued a warning of a ballistic missile threat targeting the capital.
description_en: Explosions reported in Kyiv amid ballistic missile threat. Explosions were heard in Kyiv around 1:30 a.m. local time, according to a Kyiv Independent journalist on the ground. Earlier, Ukraine's Air Force had issued a warning of a ballistic missile threat targeting the capital.
description_uk: Explosions reported in Kyiv amid ballistic missile threat. Explosions were heard in Kyiv around 1:30 a.m. local time, according to a Kyiv Independent journalist on the ground. Earlier, Ukraine's Air Force had issued a warning of a ballistic missile threat targeting the capital.

title: Grateful to Canada for the new package of sanctions against more than...
title_en: Grateful to Canada for the new package of sanctions against more than...
title_uk: Вдячні Канаді за новий пакет санкцій проти понад...
description: Grateful to Canada for the new package of sanctions against more than 160 entities linked to the Russian shadow fleet. We talked today about increased sanctions pressure on Russia during our meeting with Mark Carney. And it is important that there are such solutions. They also discussed the formats of defense cooperation, Canada's participation in financing the production of Ukrainian drones based on the Danish model, cooperation in the energy sector....
description_en: Grateful to Canada for the new package of sanctions against more than 160 entities linked to the Russian shadow fleet. We talked today about increased sanctions pressure on Russia during our meeting with Mark Carney. And it is important that there are such solutions. They also discussed the formats of defense cooperation, Canada's participation in financing the production of Ukrainian drones based on the Danish model, cooperation in the energy sector....
description_uk: Вдячний Канаді за новий пакет санкцій проти понад 160 субʼєктів, які повʼязані з російським тіньовим флотом. Говорили сьогодні про посилення санкційного тиску на Росію під час нашої зустрічі з Марком Карні. І важливо, що є такі рішення. Обговорили також формати оборонної співпраці, участь Канади у фінансуванні виробництва українських дронів за данською моделлю, співпрацю в енергетичній сфері....
